tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within or close to normal limits, except for mildly low total cholesterol and total CO₂ (bicarbonate), which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or respiratory compensation. Renal function, glucose control, and electrolytes are unremarkable. No evidence of significant dyslipidemia or microalbuminuria. Overall, results are reassuring but clinical correlation for low CO₂ is advised.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
